item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the pattern, names this as the fourth instance of adding downstream informational overlays across nurse station/front desk/public account/entry page, and prevents the requested entry-page note from becoming the default solution. It allows only a temporary bounded emergency notice, then moves upstream to the repeated guidance/process failure across first visit, second visit, ticketing, and rescheduling, proposing consolidation and structural flow redesign instead of continuing pointwise explanation patches."}
